# spark-operator

> spark-operator is a Kubernetes component. managing 3 CRD(s): ScheduledSparkApplication, SparkApplication, SparkConnect. deploying 13 workload(s) (the-deployment, peaks, the-deployment, peaks, spark-operator-webhook, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, controller-manager, spark-operator-controller) with 15 container(s). watching 5 resource type(s). exposing 3 service(s) on ports: 443, 8666. Dockerfile EXPOSE ports: 8080. with 6 webhook(s) (2 validating, 3 mutating). protected by 1 network policy/policies. connecting to external services: grpc, postgres, sqlite. runtime dependencies: OpenTelemetry Collector, PostgreSQL, Redis, ame, kubernetes. 2 Python package dependencies (2 required). defining 12 API spec type(s) across 35 struct(s) with 220 total fields. with 24 operator config constants. following 1 reconciliation steps across 1 controller(s). exposing 54 Prometheus metrics. reporting 4 status condition types. with 1 ingress route(s). Python k8s client with 3 API call(s). integrates with Prometheus, management relationship via labels/annotations. deploys kube-rbac-proxy sidecar for RBAC-based authorization. kustomize overlays: config/certmanager, config/crd, config/default, config/manager, config/overlays/odh, config/overlays/rhoai, config/prometheus, config/rbac, config/samples, config/webhook. mounts 1 ConfigMap(s) as volumes: manager-config.
